title: centaurium pulchellum var. tenuiflorum
intro: Centaurium pulchellum var. tenuiflorum, also known as mountain centaury, is a flowering plant species within the Gentianaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may help alleviate digestive issues and respiratory problems. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve symptoms of urinary tract infections, and soothe coughs and colds, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The herbal preparations of Centaurium pulchellum var. tenuiflorum can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
